name: Network Clients, Retries & Resilience
description: 网络客户端:连接重试、超时与背压韧性

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['networking','tcp','http','retries','backpressure'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(tcp|http client|connection timeout|retry policy|backpressure|connection pool|keep.?alive|tls handshake|read timeout)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
